subcodes.first_line: O Persian friends! The noble Rustam is indeed affectionate towards his companions and mindful of their happiness [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یاران پارسیانا مهتر رستم مهربان فی الحقیقه بیاران مهربانست و در فکر شادمانی
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for the departed, @praise and encouragement, @predictions and prophecies
